untranslatable_reason: Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom requires precise measurement of parallel trend lines and lead-in height calculations across a multi-phase formation (lead-in phase with widest part in first quarter, then approach to top trend line). The pattern depends on identifying two parallel trend lines, measuring their vertical distance at a specific point in formation, and projecting a target based on that measurement. These geometric trend line relationships and multi-bar phase sequencing cannot be reliably expressed using only point-in-time indicator values without explicit trend line slope and intercept calculations. The 'AUTHOR_SILENT' exit condition also lacks specification. Pattern requires trend line detection logic beyond available indicators.
